The number of sheep in the seventh year is 110 + 2 = 112. 8. The number of sheep in the eighth year is 112 + 2 = 114. 9. The number of sheep in the ninth year is 114 + 2 = 116. 10. The number of sheep in the tenth year is 116 + 2 = 118.
